display.purpose: Site name and rare signature moments.

headline.purpose: Project titles and expanded project headers.

title.purpose: Title text on flipped picture-note cards.

label.purpose: Metadata, frame counts, and interface controls.

motion.name: dock-in
motion.purpose: Reserved for project expansion entering the page flow.

motion.name: card-hover-lift
motion.purpose: Small response for picture cards and project images.

components.name: Text Button
components.description: Quiet text control used for Close and low-emphasis interface actions.
components.css: .ds-text-button { color: #A7A29A; background: transparent; border: 0; padding: 0; border-radius: 4px; font: 500 0.8125rem/1.5 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Arial, sans-serif; transition: color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-text-button:hover { color: #28231F; } .ds-text-button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CA4D0B; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Picture Note Card
components.description: Horizontal deck card that swaps between a picture face and a note face.
components.css: .ds-picture-card { width: min(78vw, 30rem); aspect-ratio: 4 / 5; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; text-align: left; background: #F4F2ED; color: #28231F; border: 1px solid #DEDAD3; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; transition: transform 300ms ease-out; } .ds-picture-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-picture-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CA4D0B; outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-picture-card-title { max-width: 12ch; font: 600 clamp(1.75rem, 3vw, 2.625rem)/0.98 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-picture-card-body { max-width: 31ch; color: #706A62; font: 400 1rem/1.75 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Arial, sans-serif; }

components.name: Project Row
components.description: Index row for selected work before a project opens into the horizontal deck.
components.html:
01

Sable House

A residential launch shaped as a calm editorial experience.
components.css: .ds-project-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 4rem minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 24px; padding: 32px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #DEDAD3; background: #FBFAF7; color: #28231F; } .ds-index { color: #A7A29A; font: 500 0.875rem/1.5 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-project-row h2 { max-width: 12ch; margin: 0; font: 600 clamp(2.1rem, 5vw, 4.5rem)/0.92 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Arial, sans-serif; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-project-row p { max-width: 40ch; margin: 16px 0 0; color: #706A62; font: 400 1.0625rem/1.75 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Arial, sans-serif; }

components.name: Signature Navigation
components.description: Site-name home link, treated as identity more than navigation chrome.
components.css: .ds-signature-nav { display: inline-block; max-width: 9ch; color: #28231F; text-decoration: none; font: 400 clamp(2.75rem, 8vw, 7rem)/0.88 Marcellus, Georgia, serif; transition: color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-signature-nav:hover { color: #CA4D0B; } .ds-signature-nav:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CA4D0B; outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview:
This portfolio should feel like a still room with one precise ember of color. The experience is calm, respectful, and inviting, but not timid. It gives a curious mind enough restraint to read and enough strangeness to remember who made it.

The system is an editorial brand surface, not an app shell. Typography, measure, and pacing carry the first impression. The portfolio should reject generic SaaS portfolio patterns, flashy gimmicks, noisy card grids, over-explained prototype copy, heavy decorative chrome, and raw Notion export behavior.
keyCharacteristics: Quiet white-base atmosphere with rare, deliberate color.
Large, tight display type paired with restrained body text.
Flat surfaces, fine rules, and measured spacing instead of shadow drama.
Project interactions that invite curiosity without shouting instructions.
Picture-card moments that can carry hidden notes behind the image.

rules.name: The Rare Ember Rule
rules.body: Burnt Ember must stay rare. If it appears everywhere, the system becomes noisy and loses the daring quality.

rules.name: The White Base Rule
rules.body: Warm Paper remains the default atmosphere. Do not drench the portfolio in dark navy unless a specific campaign section earns that shift.

rules.name: The Measure Rule
rules.body: Headlines may be narrow and dramatic; body copy may not. Any paragraph longer than 66ch is too wide for this portfolio.

rules.name: The No Default Label Rule
rules.body: Labels are small, calm, and specific. Avoid repeated uppercase tracked labels unless the label is doing real work.

rules.name: The Flat-Still Rule
rules.body: No ambient card shadows at rest. If a surface needs hierarchy, use spacing, scale, border, or tonal contrast first.

dos: Do use Deep Curiosity Navy and Burnt Ember as brand anchors, not as decoration.
Do keep the interface calm, respectful, inviting, and a bit daring.
Do let large type, line length, and spacing create hierarchy before adding visual chrome.
Do keep project opening, closing, horizontal browsing, and picture-note reading keyboard accessible.
Do respect reduced-motion preferences when adding animation beyond simple state changes.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS portfolio patterns.
Don't make the interface feel like a raw Notion export.
Don't turn Burnt Ember into a repeated badge, stripe, or loud CTA color across every section.
